title: Manage app access to Rovo with blocklists
description: Organization admins can choose which apps shouldn’t have access to Rovo features, using the new Rovo access page in Atlassian Administration. This update replaces the allowlist approach in the AI-enabled apps page with a blocklist, making it easier to see and manage where Rovo features are disabled across your organization.
